top_signals.title: BofA’s Hartnett Warns Mega-IPOs Risk Bubble Like Roaring ‘20s
top_signals.summary: Mega IPOs like those eyed by SpaceX and OpenAI threaten to push the weighting of tech in equity benchmarks beyond market-bubble levels of concentration, according to Bank of America Corp. strategist Michael Hartnett.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
